name: Barnyard
post_apply_message:
Barnyard setup order matters (retail game, non-Steam):
1. Game folder on the SD card; add Barnyard.exe to Steam and force a Proton version.
2. RUN THE GAME ONCE, then quit — this creates the Proton prefix.
3. Re-apply this fix — the registry step (controller enable) needs that prefix.
4. Run Setup/Setup.exe once (via Proton) and set Screen Size to 800x600 — the widescreen fix takes over from there at 1920x1200 (16:10).
If the game folder name case differs from Data/Movies on your copy, tell GFM's author (intro-skip targets are case-sensitive on Linux).
notes: Fresh build 2026-07-07, per Tony's spec: 1920x1200 (16:10), controller enabled, intros skipped. Widescreen & FOV Fix by AlphaYellow (PCGW community file 3817 — download is behind a csrf/terms gate so the .asi is committed here with credit; ini preconfigured Width=1920 Height=1200 FOVFactor=1.0). ASI Loader dinput8.dll fetched pinned from ThirteenAG v9.7.2 (GitHub digest matches). ControllerEnabled=1 via new wine_registry step (HKCU lives in the prefix's user.reg; needs the prefix to exist, hence optional + re-apply flow). Game is retail CD-ROM only — bring your own install, non-Steam shortcut flow, keep on SD. Save games live IN the game dir (<game>/Save) so they ride along on the SD card. Windowed-mode reg key (RealForcedWindowed) deliberately skipped — gamescope handles fullscreen. dgVoodoo2 skipped — Proton's DXVK translates D3D8 natively. XInput Plus skipped — Steam Input covers remapping.
